title: Pattern Dojo
description: Master the 18 algorithm patterns behind the NeetCode 150 — intuitively and interactively. NEWEST: a Complexity Profiler that measures the empirical Big-O of YOUR code — it times your solution across a geometric ladder of input sizes in a sandboxed worker, fits the curve to a growth class with a robust Theil–Sen log–log slope, plots it on a from-scratch log–log chart, and tells you whether you hit the optimal — so an accepted-but-O(n²) answer to an O(n) problem gets flagged instead of passing silently. Built on Code Dojo, a from-scratch in-browser judge — solve 36 curated problems in a real editor and run your JavaScript against sample + hidden tests in a sandboxed Web Worker (infinite loops caught as time-limits), every solve graduating that pattern into spaced review. Plus 18 keyboard-driven step-through visualizers with shareable frame deep-links, a pattern-recognition trainer, a full SM-2 spaced-repetition engine with mastery tracking, a daily review dashboard, pattern-of-the-day, streaks, guided per-problem approaches, a printable complexity cheat-sheet, a ⌘K command palette, and a light/dark theme.
